skills.description: Use after code edits when verifier, regression, and changed-surface evidence must be synchronized.
useWhen: code changed locally
verification evidence must be refreshed
closeout needs changed surface + verifier status
avoidWhen: no code or config changes occurred
task is pure research without repo mutation
promotionCriteria: repeatedly prevents false completion on changed code
rollbackCriteria: causes overbroad verification or hides failed checks

skills.description: Use when closing or pausing a long-running task and a carry-forward bundle is required.
useWhen: session is ending
task will be resumed later
operator needs a concise continuation bundle
avoidWhen: turn-local scratch work does not need persistence
workerDecisionConnection: missing handoff evidence prevents durable closeout
promotionCriteria: repeatedly preserves resume-ready state without transcript dependence
rollbackCriteria: bloats handoff or promotes unverified one-off learnings

skills.description: Use before declaring a long-running task session complete or paused to prevent false completion.
useWhen: session is being closed
completion is claimed
verifier findings must be checked before handoff
avoidWhen: task initialization only
rollbackCriteria: adds process closure without improving adoption evidence

skills.description: Use when worker decision surfaces and adoption readiness must be reviewed before stopping.
useWhen: worker decision needs review
adoption readiness must be checked
operator action must be ADOPT, REVISE, or BLOCK
avoidWhen: no decision artifact exists and no task outcome is being claimed
promotionCriteria: improves stop/continue decisions without increasing HITL
rollbackCriteria: overrides evaluator output or treats review closure as adoption

skills.description: Use when artifact improvements must become governed reusable learning rather than one-off notes.
useWhen: docs, UI, code, tests, or instructions improved
reusable pattern or anti-pattern must be captured
promotion or rollback condition must be defined
avoidWhen: change is a one-off fix with no reusable behavior
workerDecisionConnection: learning changes require evidence before adoption claims
promotionCriteria: reused successfully with evidence and no guard failures
rollbackCriteria: harmful, neutral, stale, or unsupported by task evidence

skills.description: Use when user corrections, failed validations, PASS/FAIL contradictions, repeated misses, or subjective adoption failures must become scoped recurrence-prevention patches.
useWhen: user correction or acceptance feedback identifies a miss
task artifact truth and harness validation status disagree
a repeated miss must become a next-turn preflight question, checklist, replay plan, and lifecycle decision
avoidWhen: there is no correction, mismatch, or recurrence risk to triage
the needed fix is already a deterministic code or test change with no reusable judgment pattern
the user requested pure execution without learning capture
evidenceSurfaces: actual artifact, diff, screenshot, response, or file contents
harness status, validation reason, worker decision surface, or eval output
workerDecisionConnection: unresolved correction triage can prevent COMPLETED
missing replay or inverse coverage maps to FAILED_VALIDATION
promotionCriteria: same recurrence patch pattern prevents misses across replayed and adjacent cases
promotion follows replay verification and reusable workflow evidence
rollbackCriteria: weakens validation gates without inverse coverage
routes deterministic fixes into prose-only reflection

skills.description: Use when README, architecture docs, current logs, output artifacts, and decision surfaces may disagree.
useWhen: repo truth needs audit
docs/code/output mismatch is suspected
completion claim may be stale
avoidWhen: single-file local edit has no public artifact or doc impact
workerDecisionConnection: repo truth mismatch can force FAILED_VALIDATION
promotionCriteria: catches stale or contradictory public surfaces before release
rollbackCriteria: creates broad audits without actionable mismatch evidence

skills.description: Use when goal or learning status remains NOT_YET after implementation appears complete.
useWhen: goal_completion_status is NOT_YET
learning adoption status blocks completion
metric does not move after code changes
avoidWhen: status is already current and passing
rollbackCriteria: guesses root cause without checking artifact generation path

skills.description: Use for design-sensitive web/UI work requiring acceptance brief, visual evidence, reference comparison, and adoption decision.
useWhen: web or UI design quality matters
UI acceptance brief or benchmark must be locked
visual evidence is required
avoidWhen: pure backend or non-visual change
promotionCriteria: improves subjective UI adoption with proof
rollbackCriteria: turns design work into generic dashboard or lacks comparison evidence

skills.description: Use when browser, Playwright, DevTools, or MCP UI evidence fails and Codex must retry, fall back, or truthfully defer.
useWhen: browser verification is flaky
Playwright or MCP startup fails
visual evidence cannot be collected
avoidWhen: browser evidence passed and is stable
workerDecisionConnection: missing browser evidence blocks visual completion claims
promotionCriteria: reduces false browser failures and false visual completion
rollbackCriteria: hides missing visual proof behind fallback claims

skills.description: Use for multi-file refactors requiring minimal diff, docs/code/output sync, tests, and rollback notes.
useWhen: multiple files or surfaces change
refactor must remain minimal and reversible
docs/code/output sync is required
avoidWhen: single isolated edit with no shared behavior impact
promotionCriteria: prevents unrelated edits and unsafe refactor closure
rollbackCriteria: encourages broad cleanup or reverts user changes

skills.description: Use when adding, cataloging, auditing, promoting, or rolling back repo-local skills.
useWhen: skill package changes
skill candidate promotion is proposed
skill effectiveness or harm must be classified
avoidWhen: no skill surface is touched
workerDecisionConnection: skill promotion must not bypass evidence gates
promotionCriteria: reproducibility evidence, adoption feedback, and evaluation lesson link are present
rollbackCriteria: guard failure, regression, harmful outcome, or stale behavior

skills.description: Use to evaluate Codex or Agent skill-package design against activation, layering, naming, progressive disclosure, evaluation, and governance criteria.
useWhen: SKILL.md or repo-local skill design needs review
skill portfolio quality or naming contract must be assessed
a skill needs adoption, revision, draft, or rollback classification
avoidWhen: the user requested direct skill implementation without a review step
the target is not a skill package or skill portfolio
workerDecisionConnection: skill design review can inform ADOPT, REVISE, DRAFT_ONLY, or ROLLBACK before relying on a skill
promotionCriteria: repeatedly finds actionable skill-design defects with analyzer evidence and low false positives
rollbackCriteria: rewrites review criteria to fit targets, mutates analysis-only targets, or gives generic advice without file evidence

skills.description: Use when authoring, comparing, or hardening repo-local Codex skills with explicit output, evidence, verification, rollback, and catalog contracts.
useWhen: a repo-local skill package is being authored
an existing skill-creator output needs Harnes-specific evidence contracts
skill generator candidates must be compared by downstream skill quality
avoidWhen: the task only needs read-only skill design review
a simple script, doc edit, or existing instruction is enough
the skill would be created only to satisfy a rubric score
workerDecisionConnection: a generated skill is not adoptable without downstream evidence, catalog sync, and rollback criteria
promotionCriteria: creates repo-local skills that pass design review and reduce repeated operator steering on real tasks
rollbackCriteria: overfits to analyzer structure, duplicates official skill-creator without repo-specific value, or increases operator confusion

skills.description: Use to review Codex skills, harness design, App Server runtime, config, evidence, and UI surfaces against the bundled agent-essence principles without mutating the target.
useWhen: Codex skill or harness design needs principle review
AGENTS.md .codex .agents scripts/config App Server or HarnesUI surfaces need agent-essence alignment
non-mutating Codex design feedback is requested
avoidWhen: the target is primarily a Claude Code harness surface
the task requires direct implementation edits instead of principle review
workerDecisionConnection: Codex principle review can inform REVISE or KEEP before skill or harness promotion
promotionCriteria: repeated Codex reviews produce actionable design corrections without Claude-surface false negatives
rollbackCriteria: routes implementation tasks into analysis-only review, ignores Codex current-truth surfaces, or gives generic principle commentary

skills.description: Use to diagnose Codex App Server harnesses against Codex-native authority, runtime, evidence, skill, current-truth, and UI semantics surfaces.
useWhen: Codex harness evaluation or scorecard is requested
AGENTS.md .codex .agents skills scripts/config docs logs or output truth need diagnosis
the user asks how to improve this harness
avoidWhen: the target is a Claude Code harness with CLAUDE.md and .claude settings as primary surfaces
the user requested implementation rather than read-only diagnosis
workerDecisionConnection: Codex harness diagnosis can inform REVISE or KEEP without replacing release evidence
promotionCriteria: repeated Codex harness diagnostics produce evidence-backed improvements without Claude-surface false negatives
rollbackCriteria: overfits to this repo, confuses diagnosis with release readiness, or mutates harness surfaces during analysis-only tasks
